content_en:
“A day would not pass without Allah’s Messenger visiting all of us. one at a time...”

“Allah has decreed for man his portion of fornication which he will inevitably commit...”

‘““Allah’s Messenger used to divide his time equally amongst us and would pray...”

“Allah’s Messenger visited all of his wives in tum when he was sick...”

“A man will continue to beg people for their money until he comes (before Allah) on the Day of Judgement...”

“Any woman who dies while her husband is pleased with her will enter Paradise...”

“A woman may be married for four reasons...”

“A woman’s prayer within the confines of her house is better.”

“Begging under other than these three conditions, O’ Qubaysah, is Haram and the devouring of haram.”

“Do not beat your wives as you would your servant girls...”

“Do not feel that vou are unimportant among vour people...”

“Do not give a second look (to women)...”

Polygamy in Islam 105

“Every eye is adulterous...” 52

“Fear Allah in dealing with your women because you have taken them in your trust...” 28

“If a wife appropriates his (her husband’s) money...” 32

“If a woman says her prayers, fasts her month (Ramadan), guards her private parts

and obeys her husband...” 27 & 34 “If a woman refuses her husband’s bed and he passes

the night in anger...” 32 “It is not permitted in Islamic law to leave...” 33

“Tf one of you were to take a rope and bring a

bundle of firewood on his back...” 90 “It is from the Sunnah that if a man marries a virgin

that he stay with the virgin wife for 7 days...” 71 “Marriage is a part of my Sunnah...” 23

“O’ ‘Abdullah, have I not been informed that you fast all day and pray all night?” 72

“O” husband, verily, she has a right that you should sleep with her once in every four days if you are to be just...” 68

“O° Messenger of Allah, I give my day to ‘A’ishah.” 78 “O’ Messenger of Allah, verily Abu Sufyan is a very stingy man...” 37

Sawdah was reported to have given the whole of her day to ‘A’ishah. 66

“The best way of earning a livelihood is by one’s own hands...” 89

106 Index of Haclith

“The most disliked of allowable things by Allah is divorce.”

“The most perfect of the Believers in faith is the best of them in character...”

The Prophet (#) once swore not to sleep with his wives for a month.

“The Prophet (#2) remarked, “That is much better than begging and disgracing yourself on the Day of Judgement.”

“The Prophet (sz) said, “Go away from me ‘A’ishah for surely it is not your day.”

“The Prophet (2) said, “O’ gathering of young men! Whoever among you has the means...”

“The Prophet (#2) stated that if mankind had been ordered to prostrate to anyone...”

“The Prophet (2) used to go to all of his wives in a single night and he had nine...”

“The Prophet (#¢) used to have nine wives at one time.”

The Prophet (gs) was once asked, “Who is the best among women?”

The Prophet (#) would often sew his torn clothes, repair his worn out shoes...

“The soul of Allah’s Messenger was taken in my house and on my day...”

* See it in the footnote.

85*

3]

Polygamy in Islam

‘Umar said that Allah’s Messenger forbade ‘Az/ with a free woman without her permission.

“Verily, every one of you is a shepherd...” “When a man calls his wife to satisfy his desire...”

“When a servant of Allah marries, he has completed half of his religious obligations...”

“When Allah’s Messenger was ill, he called all of his wives together and said...”

“Whenever the Prophet (2) wanted to travel, he used to draw lots among his wives...”

“When the Prophet (zs) was asked about women’s rights over men...”

“Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day should not hurt his neighbour and should admonish women in a good way...”

“Whoever has two wives and leans unduly to one of them will come to the Day of Judgement...”

“You have got rights over women in that they are not allowed to let anyone you dislike...”
content_id:
"Dulu tidak ada satu hari pun kecuali Rasulullah ﷺ mengunjungi kami satu per satu..."

"Allah telah menetapkan bagi setiap anak Adam bagiannya dari perzinaan yang pasti akan ia lakukan..."

"Rasulullah ﷺ biasa membagi waktunya secara adil di antara kami dan biasa berdoa..."

"Rasulullah ﷺ tidak meninggalkan kami kecuali setelah mengunjungi semua istrinya..."

"Ya Allah, ini adalah pembagianku dalam hal yang aku miliki kemampuannya, maka janganlah Engkau menyalahkanku dalam hal yang Engkau miliki namun aku tidak memilikinya..."

Kumpulan indeks hadis-hadis yang dirujuk dalam teks, beserta sumbernya dari kitab-kitab hadis mu'tabar seperti Shahih al-Bukhari, Shahih Muslim, Sunan Abu Dawud, dan lainnya.
